articles.title: 'The comet went in, but only a cloud of debris came out': Watch bright Comet MAPS get torn apart by the sun - Live Science
articles.description: New images show the sungrazer comet C/2026 A1 (MAPS) did not survive its close approach to our home star. Instead, the celestial object briefly turned into a "headless wonder" before fully disintegrating.
